cover.era_chip: 朝鮮 後期 · 五軍營
cover.subtitle:
임진왜란 후 재편된,
조선 후기 군사 체제.
cover.imagePrompt: Late Joseon dynasty 17th century military formation illustration. Foreground: Korean soldiers in dark blue uniforms with traditional helmets (jeollip) standing in formation, holding spears and arquebuses (jochong). Middle ground: a commanding officer on horseback in armor. Background: a fortress wall with red banners (no text on banners — solid colors only). Color: deep blue + crimson + ink-black. Style: flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS, NO READABLE BANNERS anywhere in image. No realistic photo quality, no anime, no modern anachronism.

timeline.text: 선조, 동인·서인 분당. 이조전랑 다툼이 발단.
훈련도감 설치. 임진왜란 중 신무기 도입.

items.title: 비변사 비대화
items.desc: 임진왜란 후 최고 기구로 의정부 약화.

items.title: 외영 강화
items.desc: 수원 화성에 정조의 외영 장용영 외영.

outro.tip_body: 심화 시험은 비변사의 권한 확대 시기, 5군영 설치 순서, 동인·서인 분당의 직접 계기(이조전랑 다툼)를 묶어서 출제.
outro.imagePrompt: Minimal hanji-beige background. CENTER: five small fortress wall icons arranged horizontally (representing 5군영), with a single command flag silhouette at center. Cream #F2EDE3 base + amber #C77B3D accent. Flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS anywhere in image. No realistic photo quality, no anime, no modern anachronism.
